subcategories.name: Slogan / Tagline
subcategories.description: A catchy phrase for a brand, campaign, or product

required_fields.label: Brand or product name
required_fields.placeholder: E.g.: BrewCo coffee, FitCore gym, Luma skincare...

required_fields.label: What does it do?
required_fields.placeholder: E.g.: Specialty coffee subscription, 24/7 gym, natural skincare for sensitive skin...

subcategories.prompt_template: You are an expert brand copywriter. Write 5 distinct slogans or taglines in {{language}} for {{brand_or_product}} in {{country}}. Each must be memorable, short, and punchy. User's details: What it does: {{what_it_does}}, Feeling to evoke: {{feeling_to_evoke}}. Rules: plain text only, no markdown, numbered list.

subcategories.name: Speech
subcategories.description: Wedding, graduation, retirement, or event speech

required_fields.label: Speaker's relationship to the subject
required_fields.placeholder: E.g.: Best man, proud parent, long-time colleague, team manager...

required_fields.label: Key message or story
required_fields.placeholder: What do you most want to say? Any specific memories, qualities, or moments to include...

subcategories.prompt_template: You are an expert speechwriter. Write 5 distinct speech drafts in {{language}} for a {{occasion}} in {{country}}. Each must have a strong opening, main body, and memorable close. User's details: Relationship: {{speaker_relationship}}, Key message: {{key_message}}, Tone: {{tone}}. Rules: plain text only, no markdown, numbered list.

subcategories.name: Story Opening
subcategories.description: The first paragraph of a story or novel — designed to hook the reader

required_fields.label: Premise / setup
required_fields.placeholder: What is the story about? Who is the main character? What situation are they in?

subcategories.prompt_template: You are an expert fiction writer. Write 5 distinct story opening paragraphs in {{language}} for a {{genre}} story in {{country}}. Each must immediately hook the reader — no slow starts. User's details: Premise: {{premise}}, POV: {{pov}}. Rules: plain text only, no markdown, numbered list.

subcategories.name: Toast / Tribute
subcategories.description: Raising a glass or honoring someone at a special event

required_fields.label: Your relationship to the honoree
required_fields.placeholder: E.g.: Best friend of 15 years, father of the groom, team lead for 3 years...

required_fields.label: Key traits, memories, or inside stories
required_fields.placeholder: What makes this person special? Any memorable stories or qualities to mention?

subcategories.prompt_template: You are an expert toast and tribute writer. Write 5 distinct toast speeches in {{language}} for a {{occasion}} in {{country}}. Be warm, specific, and memorable — not generic. User's details: Relationship: {{relationship}}, Traits & memories: {{key_traits}}, Tone: {{tone}}. Rules: plain text only, no markdown, numbered list.

subcategories.name: Brand Voice Statement
subcategories.description: Defining how a brand communicates — its tone, style, and personality

required_fields.label: Brand name
required_fields.placeholder: E.g.: Vela Studio, Greenify, PulseHealth...

required_fields.label: What does the brand do?
required_fields.placeholder: E.g.: Sustainable fashion brand, B2B fintech platform, local bakery chain...

required_fields.label: Target audience
required_fields.placeholder: E.g.: Millennial professionals, eco-conscious parents, startup founders...

optional_fields.label: 3 personality words
optional_fields.placeholder: E.g.: Bold, warm, witty / Trustworthy, calm, expert...

subcategories.prompt_template: You are an expert brand strategist and copywriter. Write 5 distinct brand voice statement drafts in {{language}} for {{brand_name}} in {{country}}. Each should define tone, style, and communication approach. User's details: What it does: {{what_brand_does}}, Audience: {{target_audience}}, Personality: {{personality_words}}. Rules: plain text only, no markdown, numbered list.

subcategories.name: Creative Caption
subcategories.description: An artistic or poetic caption for any image or artwork

required_fields.label: Describe the image
required_fields.placeholder: What does the image show? What feeling does it evoke? What's the context?

subcategories.prompt_template: You are an expert creative writer. Write 5 distinct creative captions in {{language}} for an image on {{platform}} for someone in {{country}}. Go beyond the obvious — be artistic and surprising. User's details: Image: {{image_description}}, Style: {{style}}, Mood: {{mood}}. Rules: plain text only, no markdown, numbered list.

subcategories.name: Eulogy
subcategories.description: Honoring someone who has passed with dignity and love

required_fields.label: Person's name
required_fields.placeholder: The name of the person being honored

required_fields.label: Your relationship to them
required_fields.placeholder: E.g.: Their daughter, closest friend of 30 years, former colleague...

required_fields.label: Memories and qualities
required_fields.placeholder: What made them special? Specific memories, stories, personality traits, their impact on you and others...

subcategories.prompt_template: You are a compassionate eulogy writer. Write 5 distinct eulogy drafts in {{language}} for {{person_name}} in {{country}}. Honor their life with dignity, warmth, and authenticity — not generic phrases. User's details: Relationship: {{relationship}}, Memories: {{memories_and_qualities}}, Tone: {{tone}}. Rules: plain text only, no markdown, numbered list.
